extortion.description: Fabcon manufactures and erects precast concrete wall panels for every type of structure. Projects range from a 10,000 square-foot machine shop to a one-million square foot distribution center, and from a single-story bakery to a 16-story housing facility.We will upload almost 190gb of corporate data soon. Client information, employee personal documents (passports, SSNs, DLs and so on), detailed financials, projects (confidential files), NDAs, etc. Kerkstra Precast company data will be disclosed as well.
